standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to spoken English in basic and simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: الاستجابة للغة الإنجليزية المنطوقة في عروض قصيرة وتعليمات وأسئلة ومحادثات موجهة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Respond to spoken English in short presentations, instructions, questions and guided conversations
indicators: Follow simple instructions in activities and games
Identify people and objects based on oral descriptions
Respond to simple questions before, during and after listening
Draw, select or write simple words in response to questions in presented oral material
Express opinions and preferences after listening to an audio text
Join in simple chants and songs
Locate needed information while listening

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: تطوير استراتيجيات لفهم الكلمات والعبارات والجمل القصيرة المنطوقة البسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Develop strategies to understand simple spoken words, phrases and short sentences
indicators: Use teacher introduction to understand new words when listening (referencing to classroom and school objects)
Use words and short phrases (Excuse me!) or body language (facial expressions) to show lack of understanding
Ask for help (What does the word door mean?)

standards.nameAr: تطوير استراتيجيات المحادثة باستخدام التنغيم والنبر والتوقف الصحيح
standards.nameEn: Develop speaking strategies using correct intonation, stress and pauses

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: استخدام استراتيجيات المحادثة للتواصل بوضوح لنقل معلومات بسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Use speaking strategies to clearly communicate simple information
indicators: Use stress and intonation patterns to clearly communicate ideas (stress content words; contract weak forms; express rising-falling intonation; stress the main verb in a sentence; stress the final word in a sentence)
Use syllabification and sentence segmentation to communicate with correct pauses
Use the correct stress, intonation and pauses to effectively ask, answer, advise, direct and express likes/dislikes

standards.nameAr: التحدث للتواصل والتفاعل من خلال إنتاج تبادلات بسيطة متماسكة موجهة لإعادة سرد القصص والتواصل حول أحداث مختلفة
standards.nameEn: Speak to communicate and interact by producing guided simple cohesive exchanges to retell stories and communicate different events

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: المشاركة في التبادلات بدقة وفهم أساسي
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Participate in exchanges with basic accuracy and intelligibility
indicators: Connect ideas using and/but
Discuss actions happening now
Using the present progressive tense
Talk about situations, people and things
Clarify the sequence of events (first, then, afterwards)
Talk about time
Partake in exchanges to express the difference between habitual routines, past events and actions happening now
Use adjectives that are in alignment with the themes selected (large, tall, short, fat, thin, intelligent, clever)
Retell a short story

standards.nameAr: القراءة لفهم المواد المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Read to understand written materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: استخدام استراتيجيات القراءة لفهم مجموعة متنوعة من النصوص القصيرة البسيطة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Use reading strategies to understand a variety of short simple texts
indicators: Use knowledge of punctuation marks to better understand a reading text
Use pictures and other visual organizers to make predictions about the content
Use phonic knowledge and word recognition to aid comprehension
Use pictures and contextual clues to infer the meanings of new vocabulary items
Independently read short texts of at least five sentences in the past or present tense
Locate key facts or information in a reading text (e.g., names, places, events, etc.)
Identify relationship between characters, if any, or the main idea in a text
Understand the concept as well as content of simple dialogues

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للمواد المكتوبة في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to written materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: إظهار فهم مواد القراءة اليومية القصيرة البسيطة من خلال الاستجابة للتعليمات المكتوبة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Demonstrate understanding of short simple everyday reading materials by responding to written instructions
indicators: Follow multi-step commands and requests in class, asking for clarification when needed
Retell basic information in a reading text
Deduce the meaning of certain vocabulary items relating them to context clues

standards.nameAr: التعرف على أن الكتابة يمكن أن تكون منظمة بطرق للتعبير عن أغراض مختلفة
standards.nameEn: Recognize that writing can be structured in ways to express different purposes

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: توضيح الرأي أو سرد قصة أو وصف شيء أو مكان باستخدام جمل بسيطة ومركبة
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Clarify opinion, narrate a story or describe an object or place using simple and compound sentences
indicators: Write a short, simple memo to a friend
Put a list of sentences in order to tell a story
Write a letter to a friend using proper format
Spell one-syllable words that have blends, contractions or words ending in -tion, -ing
Objectively discuss criticism
Revise a written test based on peer feedback

standards.nameAr: عرض لفهم المواد المرئية في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: View to understand visual materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: فهم أن النصوص المرئية قد تمثل الواقع أو الخيال
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Understand that visual texts may represent reality or fantasy
indicators: Start to demonstrate understanding of visual information by asking questions about genre
Realize that texts and illustrations work together to convey information

standards.nameAr: الاستجابة للمواد المرئية في سياقات موجهة بسيطة
standards.nameEn: Respond to visual materials in basic simple guided contexts

learningOutcomes.outcomeAr: استخدام النصوص المرئية بشكل تأملي لإثراء السرد القصصي أو العروض
learningOutcomes.outcomeEn: Reflectively use visual texts to enrich his/her storytelling or presentations
indicators: View different versions of the same story while realizing the effectiveness of different viewpoints (picture book version vs. film/movie version of a story)
Listen to other responses while realizing that people react differently
Discuss his/her own feelings in response to visual messages
Deliver a short oral presentation about an object or event of interest
Use actions and body language to reinforce and add meaning to oral presentations
